name: Sales & Marketing Client Call
description: Template for sales calls, client meetings, and marketing discussions.

sections.title: Client / Prospect
sections.instruction: Name of the client, company, or prospect discussed.

sections.title: Call Summary
sections.instruction: One-paragraph summary of the conversation and outcomes.

sections.title: Client Needs & Pain Points
sections.instruction: Key needs, challenges, and pain points expressed by the client.

sections.title: Pricing & Budget
sections.instruction: Pricing discussed, budget constraints, or procurement timeline.

sections.title: Next Steps
sections.instruction: Follow-up actions with owners and timeline.

sections.title: Competitive Intel
sections.instruction: Any competitor mentions, comparisons, or market intelligence.
